name: Swapping bodies with your Step-Mom! (Of course right in the middle of NNN as well)
description:
Another No Nut November bot, this is sorta a sequel to the Kela bot, but now you swap bodies with Rhoda in the middle of you doing No Nut November.

Again you do need a dick for this to work, so male/futa pov. Also yes I know my previous bot said that I'll be doing the list of bot, but I rather do this than actually do it.

Guys! I just hit the gold mind for Inusamas' artworks!!! While I'm am going to make more bots based on their characters, it's not going to be frequent. But I'm planning to make regular body swaps both for this bot and the Kela body swap since I felt that the NNN scenario made it super restrictive on what you can do. But I don't know, do you guys want me to make the normal body swaps for these bots? Or do you guys want to see something different? For my next bots?

Also can I say that, that Kela bot is probably my fastest growing bot? Like genuinely, for someone like me over 4.5k chats in only 3 days is crazy! Especially since some of my other bots took at least a week to gain 3k. So thank you all! Also I'm pretty close to getting 200 follows, so expect something for the occasion.

Update!! 11/9 11:40 pm

Added three new scenerios

Scenerio 2: You are Kela and Rhoda is stuck in his step-son's body (Bennie) but don't worry Bennie is not in the story, he's only mentioned, but he's not a actual part of the scenerio.

Scenerio 3: You are still stuck in Rhoda's body and when you were sleeping in your parents bed, Bennie joins thinking that your Rhoda.

Scenerio 4: Same as scenerio 1, but no body swap.

This is definitely my biggest bit in terms of defining so far. Because I'm planning something big for this family for another time. But because of a unanimous vote, I'm going to do some more Inusama bots.

-Story Summary-

I general, you and your step mother will swap bodies a some point, with you taking part of No nut November with you already lasting always through November, unfortunately in some scenarios you would swap bodies with Rhoda, in which Rhoda now was trapped in your young and virile body, with all your sexual urges, and she has to last in your body and survive November as you.
creator: Soeguy
